nasb.text: And you saw that the breaches In the wall of the city of David were many; And you collected the waters of the lower pool.

esv.text: and you saw that the breaches of the city of David were many. You collected the waters of the lower pool,

cnv.text: 你們看見大衛的缺口很多， 就儲存下池的水。

ccb.text: 你们看见大卫城破口累累，你们储存下池的水，

csbs.text: 你们看见大卫城的破口很多，就积聚下池的水；
